_comment: SYNAPSE PLAYBOOK - defines who we are, what we sell, and to whom. Every brief is shaped by this. Changing this changes the whole tool's behaviour. Update it with the partner's real info.

company.name: Digitograffi
company.one_liner: A digital marketing, AI tool automation, and AI development agency.

what_we_sell.pitch: Grow leads and online presence through SEO, paid ads, social media and content.
Automate repetitive work (research, outreach, reporting, data entry) with AI to save the team time.
Build custom AI tools, agents and integrations that fit the business's own workflow.

ideal_customer.description: Small-to-mid businesses that need a strong digital presence, or have repetitive manual work that AI can automate.
good_signals: Recently raised funding (budget for growth marketing / tech)
Old or slow website (redesign / SEO opportunity)
New product or market launch (needs a marketing push)
bad_fit: A very small solopreneur with no budget
Already locked into a large agency
A business with no digital component at all

how_to_pitch.lead_with: Open with a real trigger event (funding, hiring, new launch), not a generic 'we are an agency'.
angle_rules: If funding -> growth marketing + AI automation to scale
If hiring -> automate processes to keep the team efficient
If manual work visible -> custom AI development
avoid: False praise or invented facts (every claim needs a source)
Cramming all three services into one email - pick one angle
Em dash / en dash (use a plain hyphen)

competitors_note: Digital marketing agencies and freelancers are common competition. Our edge: marketing + AI automation + custom AI development in one place, which typical agencies do not offer.

test_account._note: Put a real company name/website here that Digitograffi could approach. If empty, the tool will ask on the CLI.
